what: Scan .claude/skills/ for subdirectories containing SKILL.md, parse frontmatter
why: Builds the skill inventory for display — users need to see all project skills at a glance

success_handling.criteria: Skills directory scanned and all SKILL.md files parsed

error_handling.action: Include skill with parseError flag, skip broken fields

decisions.rationale: Already a core dependency; consistent with other frontmatter parsing in the codebase

decisions.reason: Return full markdown body alongside metadata
decisions.rationale: UI can display skill content without a second read call

decisions.reason: Path is relative to project root, resolved at runtime
decisions.rationale: Avoids storing absolute paths that break across machines
